title: San Francisco, 1850

title: Telegraph Hill, San Francisco
description: 1 print : etching. | Print showing a cityscape view of Telegraph Hill in San Francisco, California, with rows of houses built on the hill.

title: Market Street, San Francisco
description: 1 photograph : photochrom print ; sheet 24 x 18 cm. | Photograph shows the Call Building, currently named Central Tower, Market Street, San Francisco, with people, trolleys, and horse-drawn wagons on the street.

title: San Francisco, California, 1938
description: 9 photographic prints. | Photographs show President Roosevelt standing under the big guns aboard the USS HOUSTON, reviewing the fleet in San Francisco Bay. Also includes a few portrait studies.

title: Newspaper Row, San Francisco
description: 1 photograph : print mounted on board ; sheet 13 x 18 cm. on board 26.7 x 34.3 cm. | Photograph shows Newspaper Row in San Francisco, California, including the Chronicle Building, and the Call Building, later known as Central Tower.

title: The Call Building, San Francisco
description: 1 print : photomechanical ; sheet 8.2 x 14 cm. (postcard format) | Postcard showing the Call Building, headquarters of the San Francisco Call newspaper, in San Francisco, California.  Later known as the Spreckels Building, and then Central Tower, it has survived major damage and radical remodelling.

title: San Francisco, California, 1906
description: Photographs show the earthquake and fire of 1906 including fire engines, street scenes, crowds, ruins. U.S. Army activities, and camps for refugees.
